channel.title: Green-Science on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Green-Science on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: DSP Green Science Deep Dive (v0.10) - Casimir Crystals, Quantum Chips and Full Production Chain
item.description:
Short answer: Green Science (Gravity Matrix) needs Casimir Crystals, Quantum Chips, and Graviton Lenses. The Casimir Crystal chain is the hardest - it consumes massive Hydrogen and Graphene. Build dedicated Hydrogen processing before scaling green science, or hydrogen backup will halt your entire factory.

Gravity Matrix is the fifth science tier. It unlocks Warpers (interstellar travel), Plane Smelters, Artificial Stars, and the endgame research tree. Green science is where factory design separates casual players from experts - the chain complexity rivals everything before it combined.

item.title: DSP Research Lab Guide (v0.10) - Automate Red to Purple Science Without Hand-Feeding
item.description:
Research is the clock in DSP. Every unlock — new buildings, new recipes, new logistics options — lives behind the research tree. And research lives behind science packs. If your science pack production is weak, your entire progression grinds to a halt.

This guide covers the complete science pack chain from Red Science to Purple Science, lab setup ratios, power requirements, and which research priorities actually matter for your factory's next phase.

item.title: Green Science and Warpers: Stop Being Scared of Green Matrix (DSP Guide)
item.description:
You've got Yellow Science running. Titanium flowing. Everything is… fine. Then you look at Green Matrix. Three ingredients. Processors. Casimir Crystals. Electromagnetic Turbines.

And you think: "Yeah no. I'll do it later."

I get it. Every DSP player hits this wall. But here's the thing — Green Matrix unlocks Space Warpers. And Warpers turn your factory from a solar-system-only operation into a galactic empire. You want that.

TL;DR — Green Matrix needs 3 things: Processors + Casimir Crystals + EM Turbines. Scale your existing Processor line. Build a Casimir plant. That's most of the work done.

The Three Things You Need

Green Matrix = Processors + Casimir Crystals + EM Turbines
